margin_risk_analysis.risk_detail: At larger hidden sizes (1536, 2048, 4096), Q2_K row-ceil block overhead increases relative to raw element count
margin_risk_analysis.sdir_risk: SDIR bitmap scales with d_in x d_out — grows quadratically at larger intermediate_size
margin_risk_analysis.margin_buffer: Disabled ffn_down residual provides margin at 0.5B but may shrink at larger models
margin_risk_analysis.conservative_conclusion: Margin at 0.5B may not hold at 7B scale without measurement

disk_artifact_estimate.recommendation: Use temporary directory, do not commit .sdiw or .sdir artifacts
